plan.description: Read src/types.ts, src/metrics.ts, src/agent.ts, and src/model.ts to understand the current agent architecture and how metrics are tracked.
Add a new retryCount field to ReviewMetrics in types.ts. Update formatMetricsMarkdown and printMetrics in metrics.ts to include retry information in their output.

Read src/render.ts to understand how review output is formatted. Add a new renderMetricsSummary function that takes ReviewMetrics and returns a concise one-line summary string like '5 turns, 12 tools, 2 retries, $0.05'.

Read src/review.ts to understand the review validation. Add a new utility function countFindingsByPriority that takes ReviewOutput and returns a Record<ReviewPriority, number> counting findings per priority level.

Create a new file src/summary.ts that imports from types.ts, metrics.ts, render.ts, and review.ts. Export a generateReviewSummary function that takes ReviewOutput and ReviewMetrics, calls the new functions, and returns a formatted markdown summary.
Update src/index.ts to export the new summary module. Verify all imports resolve correctly.

initialState.task: Add a review summary feature to hodor: new metrics field, new utility functions across 4 files, new summary module, updated exports.

assertions.description: Metrics display should include retry info
